basic_details.short_information: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has published the Guest Faculty Notification 2026. The recruitment is for Guest Faculty positions in the Department of Electrical Engineering. Candidates possessing B.E./ B.Tech and M.E./ M.Tech in the relevant branch with First Class or equivalent, or B.E./ B.Tech with First Class along with a Ph.D. in the relevant branch, are eligible to attend the walk-in interview. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification and walk-in venue details below.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech in relevant branch with 1st class or equivalent either in B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech from a recognized University OR 1st class or equivalent in B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch alongwith Ph.D. in relevant branch from a recognized University
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech in a relevant branch with 1st class or equivalent either in B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech from a recognized University. OR 1st class or equivalent in B.E./B.Tech in a relevant branch along with Ph.D. in a relevant branch from a recognized University.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1750/- to Rs. 2750/- per hour (Theory) / Rs. 875/- to Rs. 1375/- per hour (Lab) as per designation; Max ceiling Rs. 52,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Rs. 1750/- to Rs. 2750/- per hour (Theory) Rs. 875/- to Rs. 1375/- per hour (Lab) as per designation Maximum ceiling: Rs. 52,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DTU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DTU Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech in a relevant branch with 1st class or equivalent either in B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech from a recognized University. OR 1st class or equivalent in B.E./B.Tech in a relevant branch along with Ph.D. in a relevant branch from a recognized University.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific age limit is mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 1750/- to Rs. 2750/- per hour (Theory) Rs. 875/- to Rs. 1375/- per hour (Lab) as per designation Maximum ceiling: Rs. 52,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Guest Faculty at Delhi Technological University (DTU).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are 0 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculty position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech in a relevant branch with 1st class, or a B.E./B.Tech with 1st class and a Ph.D. in the relevant branch.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary is offered per hour for theory and lab sessions, with a maximum monthly ceiling ranging from Rs. 52,000/- to Rs. 70,000/-.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the interview venue?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at Delhi Technological University, Delhi - 110042.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is there an age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The specific age limit details are not provided in the extracted data. It is advisable to check the official notification for this information.
